transcript: Popsie, today is the day! Alright then, let's plan for the... BEST VACATION EVER! It has been my family's tradition to travel every year with very minimal preparation. The way it works is, my parents choose a destination, as random as possible, then they plan for about an hour and then this kids we're going to insert place so you better pack your bags now because we'll be leaving in an hour so we have to pack the things we need plan what to wear for the whole trip and try to look good enough without any sleep within an hour. I remember one time I was so sleepy and I forgot to bring any shoes. And since I am Asian, I'm used to taking off my shoes whenever I get in a room. And my dead brain decided to do to hong kong and of course they let us know about it as early as possible just to make sure we will not exceed their budget just because someone forgot to bring their shoes. Now here's the thing, I don't usually eat before traveling because I usually get a funny feeling in my tummy, a lot of the times I bloat, and sometimes I even vomit. But for some reason, I felt like I was ready to eat at least a single egg for traveling since airplane food is really expensive. And it was the worst decision ever. Here's the whole travel plan. As soon as we get to Hong Kong, we will ride a two-story bus to our hotel and maybe walk around and just relax. But instead, this is what happened. we were we were already in Hong Kong and we finally got into a bus that we can fit in comfortably everyone was in a good mood my younger sister was overjoyed my older sis and my parents were keeping it cool and me I was just enjoying the ride suddenly I started feeling cold. I had goosebumps all over me. I was expecting it will go away, but after a bus station went by, I started sweating, and my tummy started growling. At that moment, I knew I have a diarrhea. I was trying to wait until we get to our hotel but as every bus station went by, it keeps getting worse and worse until I can't keep it any longer. So I told my mom about it and as soon as we get to the next bus stop, we got off the bus. I immediately look for any familiar fast food and just a few meters away I saw Burger King. So I rushed in and asked the cashier if they have a restroom. Um hi, do you have a Do you have a rest room? Oh, um... Rest room? Comfort room? Bathroom? Uh, toilet? Then she started telling me something that I can't understand, but she's pointing at the door. So I guess that's the toilet? Okay, thanks. As I was ready to get in, the door was locked. Maybe someone is in here. It would be very rude if I disturb him. Is someone in here? Hello? So it's locked? So I went back to the cashier and I'm an inch away on shutting myself. Hi! Um, the toilet? Restroom? It's closed. The door does not open. And then she looked at me. This stupid foreign customer doesn't know how to understand simple instruction. Then started saying things that I can't decipher and then she handed me the keys. So I guess earlier she's trying to tell me about the keys but I just can't comprehend it. So I have to get the keys to the toilet every time I need to go to the restroom and I have a diarrhea. Perfect. I quickly got in and did my business successfully. I remember making sure no one can hear what I was doing so I turned on the faucet. I flushed it and done. And as I was about to get off the toilet, I had to do it again. But this time, this time, it did not flush. The tank was taking too long to get filled, so I did not have a choice but to wait there. The worst thing about it was the smell. The longer weight, the stronger the smell. So I started inhaling as much as I can, spread the hand soap all over the restroom in hopes that I can save the people who were peacefully having dinner once I opened the door. After a while, I was able to flush it and take back the ladyhood fees and ask for it again twice until we were able to grab a cab to our hotel. But wait, there's more. Since I made my whole family suffer out of humiliation, my father wants to make sure this will not happen again tomorrow, so he gave me some meds and an extra extra large tumbler filled with water. And at this point of the day I was very tired. I already drank a lot of water and I was super exhausted and all I want to do is sleep. So I just drank a quarter of it. no you have to drink all of this. Don't ruin our vacation just because of your diarrhea. Finish it all up. And since I just badly want to go to bed, I just drank it all up. After that, I just passed out. Woke up in the middle of the night because I badly need to pee, I rushed into the bathroom and had the best pee ever. This is the best pee ever. Why is it taking so long? Wait, this is not the hotel. I'm dreaming? I immediately woke myself up and I saw my siblings sleeping next to me, about to get wet by my own pee and like any other grown-up would probably do I cried yep that's the only way to end a day filled with bad luck my father was woken up and immediately realized what happened he knows it was kinda his fault so he took the blame what happened I spill spilled water on your bed. Sorry. Thank you.
